positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a cosmic forest at twilight. The scene features bioluminescent flora, abstract geometric representations of trees and roots, and falling stellar dust, all rendered in a clean, high-contrast silhouette style. The main subject is a central, towering 'Cosmic Tree' whose branches twist into perfect, symmetrical geometric patterns. Use a deep indigo, vibrant cyan, and electric lime palette. The composition must be balanced and suitable for apparel printing, emphasizing clean edges and strong visual contrast between the dark forest floor and the glowing elements. Vector illustration aesthetic, art deco influence, ultra-detailed, crisp lines, perfect negative space.
